# Al Khalis Tours and Travels

> Mumbai-based travel agency since 2005. Flights, visas, hotels, tour
> packages, Hajj & Umrah pilgrimages and RBI-compliant foreign exchange.
> IATA certified, TAAI member, Ministry of Hajj approved operator.
> Trusted by 15,000+ travellers.

Website: https://www.alkhalistravels.com/
Phone: +91 98929 60023 | +91 70212 31145
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/919892960023
Email: info@alkhalistravels.com
Hours: Mon–Fri 10:00–19:00, Sat 10:00–17:00 IST (Sun by appointment)

## Offices
- Head Office: Vaikunth Nadekar Chawl, 02, 90 Feet Rd, Saki Naka, Mumbai 400072, Maharashtra, India — https://maps.app.goo.gl/jVPHsTezLkwhTM2PA
- Branch: Office No. 30, 1st Floor, Crystal Plaza, Opposite Mira Road Railway Station, Mira Road East 401107 — https://maps.app.goo.gl/mDHTaYqVjRq9sZ6T8

## Services & starting prices
- Flight booking (domestic & international; IATA accredited): https://www.alkhalistravels.com/pages/flight.html
- Visa services (tourist, business, Schengen, UK, USA, UAE; 98% approval rate; UAE 2–4 days): https://www.alkhalistravels.com/pages/visa.html
- Umrah packages from ₹72,000 per person (flights + visa + hotel near Haram + transport); Ministry-approved Hajj operator: https://www.alkhalistravels.com/pages/hajj.html
- Holiday packages (Dubai, Singapore, Europe, honeymoon, family, group tours): https://www.alkhalistravels.com/pages/packages.html
- Hotel booking worldwide: https://www.alkhalistravels.com/pages/hotel.html
- Foreign exchange for 20+ currencies with doorstep delivery in Mumbai: https://www.alkhalistravels.com/pages/forex.html
